Class BattleMenuController

java.lang.Object
scenes.boss.BattleMenuController
public class BattleMenuController extends Object
Manages the in-battle sub-menu state and skill cooldowns for the boss fight. Tracks which menu is open (skills, heal, or none), cooldown turns for each skill, and active status effects (shield wall, berserk debuff).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    BattleMenuController.MenuState
    Represents which sub-menu is currently visible.
    static final record 
    BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    A lightweight view-model wrapping an ItemCounter for potions in the heal menu.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    SKILL_COUNT
    The number of player skills available in battle.
    static final String[]
    SKILL_DESCS
    Short descriptions for each skill shown in the skill menu, indexed 0–3.
    static final String[]
    SKILL_ICONS
    Unicode icon characters for each skill, indexed 0–3.
    static final int[]
    SKILL_MAX_CD
    Maximum cooldown turns for each skill after use, indexed 0–3.
    static final String[]
    SKILL_NAMES
    Display names for each skill, indexed 0–3.

    Returns a list of all potions currently in the player's inventory.

    Returns whether the Berserk debuff (from Constant Flux) is active.
    boolean

    Returns whether the skill at the given index is ready to use (cooldown is 0).
    boolean

    Returns whether the Shield Wall (Dead Calm) effect is active.

    Opens the heal/bag menu.

    Opens the skill selection menu.

    Sets the cooldown for the skill at the given index.
    void
    setShieldWall(boolean v)
    Sets the shield wall status effect.
    void
    tickCooldowns()
    Decrements all skill cooldowns by 1 turn (called at the end of each enemy turn).

      public BattleMenuController()

  • Method Details

    • getMenuState

      public BattleMenuController.MenuState getMenuState()
      Returns the currently open menu state.
      Returns:
      the current BattleMenuController.MenuState

    • openSkills

      public void openSkills()
      Opens the skill selection menu.

    • openHeal

      public void openHeal()
      Opens the heal/bag menu.

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes any open sub-menu.

    • getCooldown

      public int getCooldown(int i)
      Returns the remaining cooldown turns for the skill at the given index.
      Parameters:
      i - the skill index (0–3)
      Returns:
      remaining cooldown turns

    • isReady

      public boolean isReady(int i)
      Returns whether the skill at the given index is ready to use (cooldown is 0).
      Parameters:
      i - the skill index (0–3)
      Returns:
      true if the skill can be used

    • setCooldown

      public void setCooldown(int i, int turns)
      Sets the cooldown for the skill at the given index.
      Parameters:
      i - the skill index (0–3)
      turns - the number of turns before the skill can be used again

    • tickCooldowns

      public void tickCooldowns()
      Decrements all skill cooldowns by 1 turn (called at the end of each enemy turn).

    • isShieldWallActive

      public boolean isShieldWallActive()
      Returns whether the Shield Wall (Dead Calm) effect is active.
      Returns:
      true if incoming damage is halved this turn

    • isBerserkDebuffActive

      public boolean isBerserkDebuffActive()
      Returns whether the Berserk debuff (from Constant Flux) is active.
      Returns:
      true if the player's DEF is halved on the next enemy turn

    • setShieldWall

      public void setShieldWall(boolean v)
      Sets the shield wall status effect.
      Parameters:
      v - true to activate, false to deactivate

    • setBerserkDebuff

      public void setBerserkDebuff(boolean v)
      Sets the berserk debuff status effect.
      Parameters:
      v - true to activate, false to deactivate

    • getPotions

      public List<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry> getPotions(Player player)
      Returns a list of all potions currently in the player's inventory.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose inventory is searched
      Returns:
      list of BattleMenuController.PotionEntry objects representing available potions
